title: rubus crebrispinus
intro: Rubus crebrispinus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Nepal raspberry, is a species of shrub in the rose family, characterized by its thorny stems and edible fruit. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus crebrispinus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against free radicals. Herbal preparations of Rubus crebrispinus typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the leaves and fruit, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
